memory.summary: The group is inviting me out, but my midterm is tomorrow morning and I still have 40% of the review left to do.
Mina now knows I'm prioritizing my midterm over tonight's plans, confirming my decision to focus on the remaining 40% of review material.
I successfully increased my study progress to 82% but missed the window to go out with friends, confirming I prioritized the midterm.
After 1.5 hours of study, my midterm progress is now at 93%, leaving only a small margin before the exam tomorrow.
My study progress reached 95% after 0.5 hours, leaving only a tiny gap before tomorrow's midterm despite my low energy and sleep debt.
My study progress is now at 98% after just 0.5 hours, leaving only a tiny gap before tomorrow's midterm despite my low energy and sleep debt.
I have slept 7 hours and now have full energy with no sleep debt, yet my midterm progress is already at 98%.
I have completed the final 2% of my study material, reaching 100% progress for tomorrow's midterm.
I have finished all midterm preparation and joined the social club, yet the exam has now started.
